release_notes: v0.4.1 (BP083): MIC (Machine In Charge) — any machine in the fleet can Conduct a Plow. Federated Andon Cord 3-tier escalation. The Diagnosis primitive. Just Add Salt architecture — Substrate Salt + Federation Salt + Human Salt. Pinch/Seasoning/Preserved-in-Salt persistence tiers. Glow mechanic bounty-surfacing. WAN+LAN Constellation support. Auto-update fix (cephas latest.yml corrected to 0.4.1).
